title: Word of the dAI: OpenClaw - 16 February 2026
description: Welcome to the week of 4 February 2026 edition of From Engineer to C-Suite. Ever wanted to listen to all of the Tech and AI podcasts to keep up to date but you never have enough time? If you want insights about what real engineers and tech leaders are talking about without the noise you've come to the right place!

title: Source code 2 Engineer: Real engineer stories - "Experimentation is the key to success" Madeline Webster - Development Manager
description: In this edition, we dive into real stories from tech leaders who are also builders. We explore not only the wins but also the challenges and how they became the person they are today. We also hear about how they feel about the new AI age and what they're building. Why? Because we're all curious what others are doing in this space and want to learn from them.
